steps.title: Rewrite the speed equation
steps.content:
Start with the given equation:
$$53=\frac{2K}{v^2}$$
Multiply both sides by $v^2$, then divide by $53$:
$$53v^2=2K$$
$$v^2=\frac{2K}{53}$$

steps.title: Choose the positive value
steps.content:
Speed is positive, so use the positive value:
$$v=\sqrt{\frac{2K}{53}}$$
The answer is A.
